_comment: Runtime settings for THE LADDER. Edit this file in the served folder (next to index.html) and reload the page — no rebuild needed. Delete any key to fall back to its built-in default.
_comment_showPrompt: true opens an overlay with the exact prompt sent, on every generation. The header's 'prompt on/off' button still overrides this for the session.
_comment_engine: defaultEngine must be one of: local | cloud | mistral | proxy. A previously used engine stored in localStorage wins over this; clear it from the header toggle or with localStorage.removeItem('ladder.mode').
_comment_engines: Per-engine model name and generation parameters. maxTokens caps the answer (rungs are ~110-130 words, so ~512 is ample; raise it if answers get cut off). temperature adds spread so regenerations diverge. timeoutMs bounds a stuck or cold-loading request. The proxy engine's model/maxTokens/timeout are server-side — see app.py and its LADDER_* env vars.
